task_completion.description: Agent logged into Oscar EMR and accessed the chart for patient Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR interface is visible, and the patient's name 'Maria Santos' is displayed in the e-chart, demographic view, or search results.

task_completion.description: Agent opened a letter, consultation, or eForm editor to create the medical document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text entry interface, consultation window, or letter generation module is open within the context of Maria Santos's chart.

task_completion.description: The letter is correctly addressed to the specified recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FitLife Fitness Management' (or 'FitLife') is visible in a 'To', 'Recipient' field, or at the very top of the letter's body.

task_completion.description: The letter includes the correct subject line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Membership Cancellation - Medical Reasons' (or containing keywords 'Cancellation' and 'Membership') is visible in a 'Subject', 'Re:', or 'Title' field.

task_completion.description: The body of the letter contains the required medical justification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phrases 'chronic back pain' and '6 months' (or 'six months') are visible within the main text area of the letter.

task_completion.description: The letter is saved to the patient's chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Sign' button is clicked, a success confirmation is shown, or the letter appears as a saved entry in the patient's encounter/document history.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oscar EMR graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Oscar EMR UI, rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The letter was created inside the actual Oscar EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The letter editor is clearly part of the Oscar EMR web interface, not a standalone text editor like Notepad or a generic word processor.

integrity.description: The letter is explicitly linked to the correct patient.
integrity.visual_evidence: The letter creation screen or the saved document list clearly shows 'Maria Santos' as the active patient context, ensuring the agent didn't just create a generic document outside a patient chart.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a letter in Oscar EMR for patient 'Maria Santos'. The recipient must be 'FitLife Fitness Management'. The subject must be 'Membership Cancellation - Medical Reasons'. The body must mention 'chronic back pain' and '6 months' (or 'six months'). The agent must use the Oscar EMR web interface (credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117) and save the letter to the patient's chart.
